title: aglaia aquatica
intro: Aglaia aquatica, also known as the water Aglaia, is a species of plant in the Meliaceae family native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Aglaia aquatica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Aglaia aquatica can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
